creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #6)
>> Ah.  Would we want to use "x11-themes/gnome-icons-cool-gorilla" since that
>> was the original name?  Since it was in ports before, this is going to work
>> a little differently as I will have to copy the revision of the original
>> port just prior to its deletion.
> Ahh. It's been so long now that I could no longer find all the original
> details I used to base this off of.

Regarding this point, gnome-icons-cool-gorilla was a much smaller file and from 2003.  There appear to be multiple hits for "gorilla" Gnome icons.  As far as I can tell they are different.
